Registry / Terms / warm-up time

warm-up time

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00642 · 22 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 13 distinct definitions — harmonise.
